news.title: UIC marks Arbor Day by releasing beneficial insects
news.summary_en: Arbor Day event protects UIC’s trees and highlights the university’s commitment to sustainability.

news.title: UIC students create wearable tech for children with anxiety
news.summary_en: The project was one of 200 presented at the Engineering Expo 2026.

news.title: UIC researchers awarded $10M grant to boost young learners’ reading skills
news.summary_en: Funds launch WORDS Illinois, a multiyear professional learning program for teachers.

news.title: UIC historian  receives national service award
news.summary_en: Professor Barbara Ransby honored by the Organization of American Historians.
